user.title: Search for a Hanoi bus line
user.description: Enter a bus line number or name to search timbus.vn (e.g. "09", "32", "49").

route.title: Select the bus line
route.description: Choose the exact line/direction returned by the search.

station.title: Select the bus stop
station.description: Choose the bus stop along this line to get ETA/distance for. [Go] is the outbound direction, [Return] is the inbound direction.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach timbus.vn. Please try again.
error.no_results: No results found for that search.

abort.already_configured: This bus line and stop combination is already configured.
